nasb.text: They were also over the burden bearers, and supervised all the workmen from job to job; and some of the Levites were scribes and officials and gatekeepers.

esv.text: were over the burden-bearers and directed all who did work in every kind of service, and some of the Levites were scribes and officials and gatekeepers.

cnv.text: 管理扛抬的，並且監管所有作各種工作的人；利未人中，也有作書記、作職員和作守門的。

ccb.text: 负责监督搬运工人，还有一些做书记、官员和殿门守卫。
